articles.source: 合肥日报 / 国家超算合肥中心
articles.content: 合肥智算中心二期 6/28 正式投运，单集群部署 5 万张昇腾 910C 加速卡，FP16 算力达 1080 PFLOPS、FP8 突破 2160 PFLOPS。中心采用浸没式液冷 + 自研 RoCEv3 互联，PUE 1.08。一期已为科大讯飞星火 V6 训练提供 320 PFLOPS 算力，二期对国家实验室、长三角车企 AI 训练开放。

Phase I already provided 320 PFLOPS for iFLYTEK Spark V6 training; Phase II opens to national labs and Yangtze River Delta automakers.

articles.title: 中国电子行业 1-5 月利润同比 +103.9%，半导体设备贡献近半增量
articles.title_en: China Electronics Industry Profits +103.9% YoY in Jan-May, Semi Equipment Contributes Half
articles.summary: 工信部公布 1-5 月电子信息制造业利润总额同比 +103.9%，半导体设备、先进封装、HBM 贡献近一半增量。
articles.summary_en: MIIT reports electronics manufacturing profits up 103.9% YoY in Jan-May 2026, with semiconductor equipment, advanced packaging and HBM contributing nearly half the increment.
articles.source: 工信部 / 国家统计局
articles.content: 工信部 6/27 公布 2026 年 1-5 月电子信息制造业经济运行数据：规模以上企业营业收入 8.6 万亿元（同比 +18.2%），利润总额 4820 亿元（同比 +103.9%）。其中半导体设备贡献利润增量约 880 亿（+45%），先进封装 410 亿（+38%），HBM 与存储 360 亿（+32%）。出口结构出现 AI 服务器、HBM 模组、汽车电子三条新增长极。
articles.content_en: On June 27, MIIT released electronics manufacturing data for Jan-May 2026: revenue 8.6 trillion yuan (+18.2% YoY), profit 482B yuan (+103.9%). Semiconductor equipment added ~88B yuan in profit (+45%), advanced packaging 41B (+38%), HBM and memory 36B (+32%). Exports show three new growth engines: AI servers, HBM modules and automotive electronics.

hero.title: 中国 AI 治理框架成型：40+ 项国标 + 智能体互联 7 项国标同步落地
hero.title_en: China's AI Governance Framework Takes Shape: 40+ National Standards plus 7 Agent Interconnection Standards Land Simultaneously
hero.source: 国家标准委 / 中国政府网
hero.summary: 国家标准委披露自 2025 年起已发布 40+ 项 AI 国标，覆盖基础支撑、关键技术、产品应用三大板块；同时《人工智能 智能体互联》系列 7 项国标同步发布，搭建身份标识—能力描述—供需发现—协同交互—工具调用闭环式规范体系，填补全球智能体协同空白。
hero.summary_en: China unveiled 40+ AI national standards since 2025 covering foundational support, key tech and product applications. The 7 Agent Interconnection standards build a closed-loop spec system spanning identity, capability, discovery, interaction and tool-calling — filling a global gap in agent collaboration.

articles.title: 国家标准委公布 40+ 项 AI 国标，《智能体互联》7 项国标同步发布
articles.title_en: China Publishes 40+ AI National Standards, 7 Agent Interconnection Standards Released Simultaneously
articles.summary: 覆盖基础支撑、关键技术、产品应用三大板块，新发布的智能体互联标准搭建身份码—能力描述—协同交互闭环，身份码或转为强制性国标。
articles.summary_en: Covering foundation, key tech and product application layers. The agent interconnection standards build a closed loop from identity codes to interaction, with identity codes likely to become mandatory.
articles.content: 2026 年 6 月 26 日，国家标准委披露 2025 年以来已发布 40+ 项 AI 国标，覆盖 AI 服务器性能测试、大模型研发规范、终端智能化分级等。同步发布的《人工智能 智能体互联》系列 7 项国标，覆盖总体架构、身份码、身份管理、智能体描述、智能体发现、智能体交互、智能体工具调用。市场监管总局表示后续将推动身份码标准向强制性国标转化。
articles.content_en: On June 26, 2026, the National Standardization Administration announced 40+ AI national standards published since 2025, covering AI server benchmarks, large model R&D specs and terminal grading. Simultaneously released, the 7 Agent Interconnection standards cover overall architecture, identity codes, identity management, description, discovery, interaction and tool calling. The State Administration for Market Regulation said the identity code standard will be elevated to mandatory in due course.

articles.content_en: On June 27, 2026, DeepSeek V4 received a major update. The new DSpark speculative decoding framework, alongside the open-source full-stack speculative decoding library DeepSpec, jointly improves LLM inference. Autoregressive generation creates GPU utilization bottlenecks — DSpark leverages speculative decoding to ease them substantially.

articles.title_en: DeepSeek Debuts on Hurun Global Unicorn List at RMB 340B Valuation, Tops New Entrants

AI unicorns reached 215, up 87 from the previous list. Chairman Rupert Hoogewerf noted that global unicorn value reached RMB 54T, 'almost entirely driven by the AI boom.'

articles.title: 工信部公示首部 L3/L4 自动驾驶强制性国标，2027 年 7 月实施
articles.title_en: MIIT Publishes First Mandatory L3/L4 Autonomous Driving National Standard, Effective July 2027
articles.summary: 新申报搭载 L3/L4 的车型必须满足全部硬性条款，存量车型设一年过渡期，结束高阶自动驾驶「无强制准入规则」局面。
articles.summary_en: All new L3/L4 vehicle models must meet hardline clauses; existing models get a one-year grace period — ending the era of 'no mandatory access rules' for higher autonomy.
articles.content: 近日工信部正式公示我国首部针对 L3、L4 高阶自动驾驶的强制性国家标准《智能网联汽车自动驾驶系统安全要求》，将于 2027 年 7 月 1 日正式实施。所有新申报搭载 L3/L4 自动驾驶的车型必须满足全部硬性条款，存量车型设置一年过渡期完成整改适配。该标准结束国内高阶自动驾驶长期「无强制准入规则、人机权责模糊、各地试点标准碎片化」的野蛮生长阶段。
articles.content_en: MIIT has publicly released China's first mandatory national standard for L3/L4 autonomous driving, taking effect July 1, 2027. All new L3/L4 vehicle models must meet all hardline clauses; existing models get a one-year grace period. The standard ends the era of 'no mandatory rules, ambiguous human-machine responsibility, and fragmented local pilots' in higher autonomy.
key_points: 首部 L3/L4 强制性国标
2027 年 7 月实施
存量车型一年过渡期

articles.summary: 深圳发布的 Visics 通用具身大模型采用 VLOA 双引擎架构，覆盖视觉、语言、物体和动作理解，现场完成家具拼装等复杂操作。
articles.summary_en: Visics, launched in Shenzhen, uses a VLOA dual-engine architecture covering vision, language, object and action understanding, demonstrating complex tasks like furniture assembly live.
articles.content: RoboScience 机器科学在深圳发布通用具身大模型 Visics，并完整展示 VLOA 双引擎架构，覆盖视觉、语言、物体和动作理解。现场展示包括家具拼装等复杂操作任务，意在验证模型在真实机器人场景中的泛化能力。具身智能最怕只停留在实验室视频，复杂装配任务如果能稳定复现，说明模型正在靠近可交付的产业能力。
articles.content_en: RoboScience unveiled Visics — a universal embodied model — in Shenzhen, showcasing its VLOA dual-engine architecture covering vision, language, object and action understanding. Live demos included complex tasks like furniture assembly, verifying generalization in real robot scenarios. Embodied AI's fear is staying as lab videos — stable complex assembly proves the model is approaching deliverable industrial capability.

hero.title: 国产 AI 算力闭环时刻：美团 1.6 万亿 LongCat-2.0 全栈国产芯片训练 + 寒武纪同日万亿市值
hero.title_en: The Domestic AI Compute Loop Closes: Meituan's 1.6T LongCat-2.0 Trained Fully on Chinese Chips, Cambricon Hits $1T Cap Same Day
hero.summary: 6 月 30 日，美团正式开源 1.6 万亿参数 MoE 大模型 LongCat-2.0——业界首个在 5 万张国产 AI 芯片集群上完成训练 + 推理全流程的万亿大模型，原生 1M 超长上下文，35 万亿 token 预训练；同一天，国产 AI ASIC 龙头寒武纪市值首破万亿元人民币，成为科创板首家万亿级算力芯片企业。模型自主与芯片自主的「双万亿」共振，标志着中国 AI 产业正式从「依赖海外 GPU」过渡期迈入自主可控的 AI 2.0 时代。
hero.summary_en: On June 30, Meituan open-sourced LongCat-2.0, a 1.6 trillion-parameter MoE model — the first trillion-scale model in the industry to complete both training and inference on a fully domestic chip cluster of over 50,000 Chinese AI accelerators, natively supporting 1M context and pre-trained on 35 trillion tokens. On the same day, China's leading AI ASIC maker Cambricon became the first STAR Market company to cross the 1 trillion yuan market-cap line. The dual-trillion resonance of model autonomy and silicon autonomy marks China's official transition from GPU dependence into the self-controllable AI 2.0 era.
